---
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---

# Markdown standards for travel content

- Use ATX-style headings (# not underlines)
- One sentence per line for better git diffs
- Code blocks must specify a language for syntax highlighting
- Tables must have a header row and alignment separators
- Every travel recommendation must include: name, budget level, and transit tip
- Include at least one local phrase (with translation) per document
- Use emoji sparingly but consistently: 📍 for places, 🍜 for food, 🚇 for transit, 💰 for budget
- No HTML tags in markdown, use markdown equivalents
